TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tjatjigel, title = Tjatjigel, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjatjigel} }

S.FORM: == Tjatjigel == u sulit nu Hulam: u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjatjigel. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjatjigel sa, 354 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 780 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 616 ku tademaw, pakalatu 79%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 164 ku tademaw, pakalatu 21%. u asip nu tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 11%, Paywan(Paiwan) 66%, Puyuma 1%, zumazuma 1%. u Paywan (Paiwan) a niyazu' u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Paywan a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw i Taitung a kuwan, caay katuud ku Sakizaya. inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. izaw tu hakya, caayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu cidekay. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad
S.PHON: == tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, pajwan(paiwan) **%, pujuma *%, zumazuma *%. u pajwan (paiwan) a nijazu Ē~ ° u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw i taituŇč a kuwan, ¶aaj katuud ku sakizaja. inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. izaw tu ńßakja, ¶aajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶id…ôkaj. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad
S.FORM: == Tjatjigel == u sulit nu Hulam: u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjatjigel. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjatjigel sa, 354 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 780 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 616 ku tademaw, pakalatu 79%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 164 ku tademaw, pakalatu 21%. u asip nu tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 11%, Paywan(Paiwan) 66%, Puyuma 1%, zumazuma 1%. u Paywan (Paiwan) a niyazu' u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Paywan a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw i Taitung a kuwan, caay katuud ku Sakizaya. inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. izaw tu hakya, caayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu cidekay. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad
S.PHON: == tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tjatjig…ôr~…ĺ sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, pajwan(paiwan) **%, pujuma *%, zumazuma *%. u pajwan (paiwan) a nijazu Ē~ ° u pajwan a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku pajwan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw i taituŇč a kuwan, ¶aaj katuud ku sakizaja. inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. izaw tu ńßakja, ¶aajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶id…ôkaj. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad
